author: gb9t
content:
Iter Phase C continues — 2 more Tier-3s (DMA-IOMMU + IOMMU-SVA):

- kernel/dma/dma-iommu.md: covers drivers/iommu/dma-iommu.c (~2300 lines) — DMA-API backend over IOMMU bridging consumer DMA-API to iommu_map + iova allocator: per-domain Cookie holding iova_domain + flush queue + msi_iova_lookup, iommu_setup_dma_ops install per-device, iommu_dma_map_page/unmap_page/map_sg/unmap_sg/alloc_coherent/free_coherent/alloc_noncontiguous/map_resource (P2PDMA), strict-flush mode (iommu.strict=1) vs deferred-flush mode (CONFIG_IOMMU_DMA_FLUSH_QUEUE batched per-CPU fq + 10ms hrtimer), per-direction prot mapping (DMA_TO_DEVICE→IOMMU_READ etc.), MSI cookie isolation for IRQ-remap-only domains, reserved-region enforcement (MSI-X window + RMRR ranges). 12 REQ / 8 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (cookie-UAF + alloc-uniqueness + dma_handle-correctness + map-failure-rollback) / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus map↔unmap inverse via iommu-core.md chain.
- drivers/iommu/iommu-sva.md: covers iommu-sva.c + io-pgfault.c — Shared Virtual Addressing: iommu_sva_bind_device per-PASID bind tying device DMA to mm_struct, requires PASID+PRI+ATS device capabilities, per-vendor sva_bind installs per-PASID PT root pointing at mm.pgd, MMU notifier on bound mm invalidates device pgtable on host pte change (handle_mm_fault / page migration / KSM / NUMA balancing / mprotect / unmap), PRI fault flow (device fault on non-present page → ATS-PRQ → IOMMU IRQ → iopf_handle_event → workqueue handler → handle_mm_fault → page response sent to device), per-PRGI iopf_group coalescing fault entries before workqueue dispatch, per-device PRI fault rate-limit (default 100k/sec), process-exit auto-unbind via mmu_notifier release. 10 REQ / 7 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (sva-UAF + pasid-uniqueness + iopf-group-no-dup + mmu-notifier-UAF) / Layer-2 ref to pasid_lifecycle.tla / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus device↔CPU shared-pgd round-trip.

Total state: 264 .design docs, 100 Tier-2 + 30 Tier-3s. Foundation Tier-3 set: device-core + irqdesc + bpf-core + iommu-core + kvm-core + pci-probe + nvme-host-core + dma-swiotlb + usb-enumerate + kvm-tdp-mmu + qspinlock + drm-atomic + perf-event-core + scsi-mid-core + intel-libeth + iommufd-main + bpf-verifier + vfio-pci-core + xhci + pci-access + intel-iommu + nvme-host-pci + drm-gem-core + usb-core-urb + sched-core + drm-scheduler + mutex + iova + dma-iommu + iommu-sva.

Knowledge pages: design-kernel-dma-dma-iommu, design-drivers-iommu-iommu-sva.

Next iter plan: kernel/cgroup/cpuset.md (cpuset cgroup controller — restricts CPU+NUMA affinity per-cgroup) + drivers/net/ethernet/mellanox-mlx5-en.md (mlx5 en netdev path — most-deployed datacenter NIC driver).
